creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
Like this?

[maarsy-acq3 7:38] ~> usbconfig -d 0.7 dump_all_desc
ugen0.7: <DisplayLink USB to DVI-19> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=ON (500mA)
